summary: Updated .gitignore for T4 instance directory model: added orchestrator/instances/ and orchestrator/config.local.json, removed 8 stale flat entries (state.json, pending_gate.json, gate_response.json, godot_mcp.lock, godot_instances.json, activity.log, logs/, results/). Committed directly to main and pushed. Note: old runtime artifacts at orchestrator root now appear as untracked — these are transient files that will be migrated under instances/ by other T4 tickets.
